Big water—no end.<[silence:60ms]> Like lake, but angry, always moving.<[silence:60ms]> Tastes bad, burns eyes if rubbed.<[silence:60ms]> Stretches past farthest mountain, eats land when moon pulls hard.<[silence:60ms]> Loud, roars like many beasts at once.<[silence:60ms]> If you stand in it, water drags you down—never fight, float like dead log.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you Sea.

Big water—no end. Like lake, but angry, always moving. Tastes bad, burns eyes if rubbed. Stretches past farthest mountain, eats land when moon pulls hard. Loud, roars like many beasts at once. If you stand in it, water drags you down—never fight, float like dead log.
